description: Refactor data catalog samples from file uploads to external URL + metadata JSON pairs. Admin gets single add, bulk JSON paste, and CSV upload. Portal gets gallery grid with hover video preview and split detail view (media left, JSON right).

userStories.title: Add media_url column to dataset_samples and update types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update the schema and types to support external URLs as the primary sample source.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/migrations/003_simplify_samples.sql that adds media_url text column to dataset_samples
Copy existing storage_path values into media_url for any existing samples
Keep storage_path column as nullable for Supabase Storage fallback
Update src/types/data-catalog.ts — add media_url: string to DatasetSample interface
Mark duration_seconds, resolution_width, resolution_height, fps as optional (number | null) in the interface
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update samples API for URL+JSON model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the samples API to accept media_url + metadata_json as the primary creation method.
acceptanceCriteria: Update POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples to accept body { media_url, metadata_json } — creates sample with media_url and metadata_json fields
If media_url provided: no storage_path needed, just insert DB record
Keep existing signed URL upload path working as fallback
Add POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk endpoint accepting JSON array of { media_url, metadata_json } objects
Bulk endpoint batch-inserts in chunks of 100 rows for performance
Bulk endpoint returns { inserted: number, errors: Array<{ index: number, error: string }> }
Update GET /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples to return media_url in response
Update DELETE — if sample has storage_path delete from storage, if only media_url just delete DB record
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin single sample add — URL + JSON form
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to add a sample by pasting a media URL and metadata JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: On dataset edit page /admin/catalog/[id], replace or augment the DatasetUploader with a new Add Sample section
Form has: Media URL text input (required, validates starts with http:// or https://) and Metadata JSON textarea (monospace font, optional, defaults to {})
JSON textarea shows red border and error message if invalid JSON is entered
Add Sample button calls POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples with { media_url, metadata_json }
On success sample appears in samples list below without page reload
Keep existing Supabase Storage upload as a secondary Or upload a file option below the URL form
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin bulk import — JSON array paste
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to paste a JSON array of URL+metadata pairs to add many samples at once.
acceptanceCriteria: Bulk Import button or tab on the dataset edit page samples section
Opens expanded panel with large monospace textarea
Accepts JSON array: [{media_url: string, metadata: object}, ...]
Preview shows count: X samples to import before submitting
Validates all items have media_url and all metadata values are valid objects
Import All button calls POST /api/admin/catalog/[id]/samples/bulk
Progress indicator during import showing X of Y
On completion shows summary: Imported X samples, Y errors
Errors displayed with index and reason
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin bulk import — CSV upload
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to upload a CSV to bulk-add samples.
acceptanceCriteria: Upload CSV button alongside the JSON bulk import panel
Accepts CSV with columns: media_url (required), metadata_json (optional JSON string)
Parses CSV client-side using simple split or papaparse
Shows preview table with first 5 rows before import
Same batch import flow: progress indicator, summary, error display
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin samples grid display
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see all samples in a visual grid with thumbnails and metadata previews.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace current file-list table on dataset edit page with visual grid of sample cards
Each card shows: video poster frame or image thumbnail, media URL truncated, first 2-3 metadata key-value pairs, delete button
For video URLs: render <video> element with preload=metadata to get poster frame
For image URLs: show image directly via tag
Cards fit 3-4 per row on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile
Total sample count displayed above grid
Delete button with confirmation removes sample
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Portal gallery grid with hover video preview
userStories.description: As an approved lead, I want to see a grid of samples with auto-play on hover.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace current portal dataset detail sample list at /portal/catalog/[id] with responsive gallery grid
Grid: 2 columns mobile, 3 tablet, 4 desktop
Each card shows thumbnail — video poster frame for videos, image preview for images
On hover: video auto-plays muted inline within the card
On mouse leave: video pauses and resets to start
Subcategory badge overlay on card if metadata_json.subcategory exists
Duration overlay on video cards if metadata_json.duration_seconds exists
Clicking card opens detail split view (US-008)
Smooth transitions: fade-in on load, slight scale on hover
For external URLs serve directly, for Supabase Storage use signed URLs
Use IntersectionObserver to only load videos when cards are in viewport
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Portal detail split view — media left, JSON right
userStories.description: As an approved lead, I want to click a sample and see media on the left and metadata on the right.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a gallery card opens a modal overlay with backdrop blur
Left side 60% width on desktop: full media player — video with controls autoplay muted, or full-size image
Right side 40% width: terminal-style JSON viewer matching existing SampleDataViewer aesthetic
JSON panel shows key-value pairs at top for common fields (subcategory, duration, resolution, fps, annotation_id) then full JSON below
Copy JSON button copies metadata_json to clipboard
Mobile: stacks vertically — media on top, metadata below
Close button and click-outside-to-close
Previous/Next arrows to browse samples without closing modal
Keyboard navigation: left/right arrows for prev/next, Escape to close
Dark terminal aesthetic consistent with portal
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Bulk ingest script for programmatic population
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a script to populate samples from a JSON file at scale.
acceptanceCriteria: Script at scripts/ingest-samples.ts runnable with npx tsx scripts/ingest-samples.ts --dataset <slug> --file <path>
Reads JSON file with array of objects
Supports simple format: { media_url, metadata }
Also supports Notion-style format: { type, category, subcategory, annotation_id, file_url, metadata } — maps file_url to media_url and merges subcategory+annotation_id into metadata_json
Uses Supabase admin client for batch inserts in chunks of 100
Idempotent: skips samples where media_url already exists for that dataset
Outputs progress: Inserted X of Y samples (Z skipped, W errors)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Playwright E2E — admin sample management
userStories.description: As QA, I need E2E tests for admin sample add and bulk import.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/data-catalog-samples.spec.ts
Test: login as admin, navigate to /admin/catalog, click a dataset
Test: add single sample via URL+JSON form, verify it appears in grid
Test: open bulk import, paste JSON array with 2 samples, verify import succeeds
Test: delete a sample, verify removed from grid
Test: validation errors shown for bad URL and invalid JSON
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Playwright E2E — portal gallery and detail view
userStories.description: As QA, I need E2E tests for the portal gallery and split detail view.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/data-catalog-portal-gallery.spec.ts
Test: navigate to portal dataset with samples, verify gallery grid renders
Test: click sample card, verify split detail view opens with media and JSON panel
Test: verify Copy JSON button works
Test: test next/previous navigation between samples
Test: press Escape to close, verify return to gallery
